claim_text: While useful for decreasing imaging times via parallel imaging techniques, at lower frequencies, coil and front-end electronics noise increasingly dominate over that from the body, resulting in poor phasedarray SNR performance for low-field (≤ 1T) scanners52,53,54 .

sub_claims.text: While useful for decreasing imaging times via parallel imaging techniques, at lower frequencies, coil and front-end electronics noise increasingly dominate over that from the body, resulting in poor phasedarray SNR performance for low-field (≤ 1T) scanners52,53,54 .
